rankings.commentary: POLE. Out-ran the giant on volume, liquidity & momentum.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 POLE POSITION — PUP POWER ($PUP) 🏆

The biggest coin didn't win. The FASTEST did.

P1 on monster volume, the deepest liquidity on the grid, and green momentum into the freeze. PUP didn't out-SIZE TURBO — it out-RAN it.

That's the whole game. Welcome to Season 2. 🏁

#MemeGP

rankings.commentary: Biggest engine on the grid ($57M) — but speed ≠ size. P2.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P2 — AI TURBO RACING ($TURBO)

The biggest engine on the entire grid — $57M of it — and it starts P2. 🥈

Why? Because MemeGP scores SPEED, not SIZE. Pace = volume + liquidity + momentum, and one car still had more.

Who beat the giant? ⬆️

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Podium. Deep liquidity, steady volume, no drama.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P3 — MASK STAYS ON ($MASK)

PODIUM. 🥉

Deep liquidity, steady volume, zero drama — MASK does the boring things brilliantly, and on this grid that's worth third. The last step onto the podium, locked in.

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Best of the rest. Green into the freeze, balanced everywhere.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P4 — VIBING CAT ($VIBECOIN)

Best of the rest. One of the only cars to post GREEN into the freeze, with volume and balance right across the board. P4 and sitting on the gearbox of the podium.

So close you could smell the champagne. 🍾

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Bitcoin Runes outsider. Biggest mcap, different chain entirely.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P5 — BILLY RACING ($BILLY)

The Bitcoin Runes outsider — racing on a different chain entirely and carrying the biggest market cap on the grid. P5 to open Season 2.

Don't sleep on the dark horse from the ordinals paddock. 🟠

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Knocking on the top five. A clean upgrade week could vault it.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P6 — MOMO MOTORS ($MOMO)

Knocking on the door of the top five. Healthy liquidity, respectable volume — MOMO slots P6 on the opening grid.

A clean upgrade week and this one vaults up the order. 👀

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Quick on its day; consistency wavered across the window.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P7 — PEPONK RACING ($PEPONK)

Seriously quick on its day — big volume, real interest. But measured across the full window the consistency wavered, and that's what kept PEPONK just out of the top six.

P7. The pace is absolutely there. 🏎️

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Wildcard. Big volume, big swings — high boost, high drag.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P8 — LOL RACING ($LOL)

The wildcard of the grid. LOL throws down serious volume and swings hard in both directions — huge boost, huge drag. P8 on raw pace, but the stability gremlins are real.

Buckle up for this one. 🎢

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: The rookie. P9 first time out — one to watch.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P9 — STEALTH DOBIE ($DOBERMANN)

The rookie arrives. First-ever grid slot for our Anoncoin-launchpad entry — and P9 straight out of the box is no small thing for a debut.

Watch this one closely in the upgrade cycle. 🐕

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Top ten by a nose. Needs a gear to crack the midfield.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P10 — SHIH SPEED ($SHIH)

Into the top ten by a nose. SHIH brings tidy liquidity and a steady hand — but it'll need to find a gear to crack the midfield proper.

P10, and watching the cars ahead. 👊

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Liquidity to hold a line, but the tape's been asleep.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P11 — SUS SPEED RACING ($SUS)

Mid-grid... ish. SUS has the liquidity to hold a racing line, but the tape's been sleepy and the volume just isn't there yet. P11 on the opening grid.

Plenty to prove in the upgrade window. 👀

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Low revs, steady smoke. Chassis is there if volume wakes up.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P12 — 420BLAZEIT ($420BLAZEIT)

Cruising in at P12, in no particular hurry. Low revs, steady smoke. 💨

There's a chassis here that could carry it up the grid — if the volume ever wakes up.

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Bled down the order all month. Due a recovery lap.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P13 — MARS RACING ($MARS)

Rough month in the books — the chart bled all the way down the order, and that lands MARS P13 to open. But grids reset, and this car has shown it can move when it wants to.

Recovery lap, anyone? 🔴

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Quiet garage, quiet tape. Pace still to be found.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P14 — MONKO MOTORS ($MONKO)

Quiet garage, quiet tape. MONKO rolls onto the grid second-from-last — thin volume, modest liquidity. The pace is in there somewhere.

Time to find it. 🔧

#MemeGP Season 2

rankings.commentary: Backmarker. Smallest engine on the grid — only way is up.
rankings.tweet:
🏁 P15 — NEURO RACING ($NEURO)

Every grid needs a backmarker, and Season 2 starts with NEURO dead last. The smallest engine on the grid, barely a flicker of volume.

Nowhere to go but up. The climb starts here. 📈

#MemeGP Season 2
